ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon, via ZOOM, counsel for Jerome Schweich, Personal Representative; Charles Jonas, in Propria Persona, Interested Party.

At the outset, the court thanks Mr. Simon for providing the court with information to help move this matter forward. The court then turns to Mr. Simon regarding its concern with the request for a $2500 reserve. Mr. Simon reports that he himself would have requested a smaller reserve amount but that the request for the $2500 reserve had been submitted at his client's request. The court then queries Mr. Simon if he would be willing to continue as counsel in this matter to oversee disbursements if the court orders distribution. Mr. Simon reports that he would be willing to continue to represent Mr. Schweich but has concerns regarding having access to accounts to help with distribution but believes that Mr. Schweich would be prompted to complete his duties as Personal Representative if the court orders distribution. Mr. Jonas echoes Mr. Simon's statement.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is taken under submission. The Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is continued to August 9, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon, via ZOOM, attorney for Jerome Schwiech, Executor.

At the onset, the court and counsel discuss the status of this case. Counsel reports that he has been unable to contact his client for at least the past four months but that his client has previously stated that he had only agreed to be appointed as Executor as a favor for a friend but has been exasperated with the process and is ready to resign. Counsel also reports that the estate is ready for distribution but has been unable to obtain his clients signature on petition. The court advises counsel that a short continuance might be appropriate to see if the Executor can be brought back to complete his duties. The court also requests counsel to file a declaration to confirm what exactly in the accounting he agrees with, prior to the next hearing date.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Settlement of First and Final Report, etc., and Motion to be Relieved as Counsel are continued to June 7, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Aug-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon appeared by telephone for Jerome Schweich (Executor).

Mr. Simon stated that they were close to filing the petition, but they identified a wrinkle in the accounting and will be working on it, and requested a short continuance stating that he should have the petition filed within four-weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to August 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
